questions.question: Bathroom renovation shuru karne se pehle, sabse pehla step kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Design aur budget plan karna

questions.explanation: Renovation shuru karne se pehle, ek achha plan banana aur budget set karna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Renovation site par kaun sa Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) pehenna sabse zaroori hai?

options.B: Fancy cap aur sneakers

questions.explanation: Safety glasses aur gloves aankhon aur haathon ko chot se bachate hain, jo renovation work mein common hai.

questions.question: Electrical shock se bachne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Geeli jagah par kaam karna

questions.explanation: Electrical shock se bachne ke liye, renovation shuru karne se pehle main power supply ko band karna sabse safe tareeka hai.

questions.question: Ek bathroom renovation project mein, purane fixtures aur debris ko kahan dispose karna chahiye?

options.B: Road par
options.C: Designated waste disposal area ya skip mein

questions.explanation: Construction debris ko designated waste disposal area ya skip mein hi dispose karna chahiye, environment aur cleanliness ke liye.

questions.question: Jab aap tiles tod rahe hon, toh kaun sa tool sabse zyada useful hoga?

options.B: Hammer aur chisel

questions.explanation: Tiles todne ke liye hammer aur chisel ka use kiya jaata hai, jo effective tareeke se tiles ko nikalne mein madad karte hain.

questions.question: Renovation ke dauran water supply band karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Leakage aur flooding se bachne ke liye
options.C: Taaki naye fixtures ko install kar saken

questions.explanation: Water supply band karna leakage aur flooding se bachata hai, aur naye fixtures ko safely install karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Ek bathroom layout plan mein, 'wet area' se kya matlab hai?

options.A: Jahan par paani ka istemal hota hai jaise shower, WC
options.B: Jahan par furniture rakha jaata hai
options.C: Jahan par electrical fittings hote hain

questions.explanation: Wet area bathroom ka woh hissa hota hai jahan paani ka direct contact hota hai, jaise shower area, WC aur wash basin.

questions.question: Hazardous materials jaise asbestos ya old lead pipes ko handle karte waqt kya precautions leni chahiye?

options.B: Proper respiratory mask aur specialized equipment use karna

questions.explanation: Asbestos aur lead pipes jaise hazardous materials ko handle karte waqt proper respiratory mask aur specialized equipment ka use karna chahiye, aur experts ki salah leni chahiye.

questions.question: Renovation site par ventilation maintain karna kyun important hai?

options.B: Dust aur fumes ko bahar nikalne ke liye
options.C: Lights ko on rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper ventilation dust, fumes aur chemical vapors ko site se bahar nikalne mein madad karta hai, jisse workers ki health safe rehti hai.

questions.question: Agar renovation ke dauran koi pipe leak ho jaaye toh sabse pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Usko kapde se band kar dena
options.B: Main water supply band karna

questions.explanation: Pipe leak hone par sabse pehle main water supply band karna chahiye taaki zyada nuksaan na ho.

questions.question: Ek bathroom renovation mein, 'snag list' kya hoti hai?

options.B: Woh choti-choti imperfections ya adhure kaam jo project ke end mein theek karne hote hain

questions.explanation: Snag list mein woh sab chote-mote kaam ya imperfections hote hain jo project complete hone se pehle theek karne hote hain, taaki final quality achhi ho.

questions.question: Renovation work mein, 'ergonomics' ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Workers ki safety aur efficiency ke liye sahi working postures aur tools ka use karna
options.C: Bathroom ka color scheme choose karna
options.D: Material delivery ka time schedule karna

questions.explanation: Ergonomics ka matlab hai kaam ko aise design karna ki workers ko physical strain kam ho aur unki efficiency badhe, jisse injuries se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Aggressive chemicals (jaise tile cleaner concentrate) use karte waqt kya precautions leni chahiye?

options.B: Proper ventilation aur chemical-resistant gloves pehenna
options.D: Bachchon ko unke paas khelne dena

questions.explanation: Aggressive chemicals se bachne ke liye proper ventilation aur chemical-resistant gloves pehenna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Renovation site par fire safety ke liye kya arrangements honi chahiye?

options.B: Fire extinguisher aur exit routes clear hona

questions.explanation: Fire extinguisher aur clear exit routes fire safety ke liye bahut zaroori hain, taaki emergency mein safety ensure ho sake.

questions.question: Kon sa document renovation shuru karne se pehle client ke saath discuss karna zaroori hai?

options.B: Work scope, timeline aur payment terms

questions.explanation: Work scope, timeline aur payment terms discuss karna project ki clarity aur client satisfaction ke liye bahut important hai.

questions.question: Ek bade renovation project mein, 'permit' (anumati) ki zaroorat kyun pad sakti hai?

options.A: Neighbors ko impress karne ke liye
options.B: Legal requirements aur safety standards ko follow karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Bade renovation projects mein, building codes aur safety standards ko follow karne ke liye local authorities se permits lena zaroori hota hai.

questions.question: Renovation work ke dauran, dust control ke liye kaun sa method effective hai?

options.B: Dry sweeping karna
options.C: Wet sweeping ya vacuum cleaner ka use karna

questions.explanation: Wet sweeping ya HEPA filter vacuum cleaner ka use karne se dust particles hawa mein kam failte hain, jisse dust control better hota hai.

questions.question: Demolition shuru karne se pehle, sabse pehla kaam kya hai?

options.B: Electrical aur plumbing connections disconnect karna

questions.explanation: Demolition se pehle, electrical aur plumbing connections ko disconnect karna safety ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Purane tiles nikalte waqt, walls ya floor ko damage hone se bachane ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Carefully aur controlled tareeke se kaam karna
options.C: Bina kisi plan ke kaam karna

questions.explanation: Tiles nikalte waqt carefully aur controlled tareeke se kaam karna chahiye, taaki underlying surface ko kam se kam damage ho.

questions.question: Demolition ke baad, site ko saaf karne ke liye kaun sa tool useful hai?

options.B: Broom aur dustpan

questions.explanation: Demolition ke baad debris aur dust ko saaf karne ke liye broom aur dustpan useful hote hain.

questions.question: Bathroom mein purane WC (Water Closet) ko nikalte waqt, kis baat ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Water supply aur drain pipe ko disconnect karna

questions.explanation: WC nikalte waqt water supply line aur drain pipe ko properly disconnect karna zaroori hai, taaki leakage na ho.

questions.question: Walls ko tiling ke liye prepare karte waqt, surface kaisi honi chahiye?

options.B: Smooth, clean aur dry

questions.explanation: Tiling se pehle walls ki surface smooth, clean aur dry honi chahiye, taaki adhesive achhe se pakad sake.

questions.question: Floor leveling compound ka use kyun kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Floor ko rough banane ke liye
options.B: Uneven floor surfaces ko smooth aur level karne ke liye
options.C: Floor ko color dene ke liye
options.D: Floor ko geela karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Floor leveling compound uneven floor surfaces ko smooth aur level karne ke liye use hota hai, jo tiling ke liye ek perfect base provide karta hai.

questions.question: Demolition ke dauran, dust ko kam karne ke liye kya kar sakte hain?

options.B: Thoda paani sprinkle karna ya dust extractors use karna

questions.explanation: Dust ko kam karne ke liye demolition area mein paani sprinkle karna ya dust extractors use karna effective hota hai.

questions.question: Ek bathroom floor ki slope kis taraf honi chahiye?

options.B: Drain ki taraf

questions.explanation: Bathroom floor ki slope hamesha drain ki taraf honi chahiye, taaki paani easily drain ho sake aur paani jama na ho.

questions.question: Purane fittings jaise taps, shower heads nikalte waqt, kis tool ka istemal kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Adjustable wrench ya spanner

questions.explanation: Taps aur shower heads jaise fittings ko nikalne ke liye adjustable wrench ya spanner ka use kiya jaata hai, jo nuts aur bolts ko loosen karne mein madad karte hain.

questions.question: Agar bathroom floor par unevenness zyada ho, toh kya use karna behtar hai?

options.B: Self-leveling compound

questions.explanation: Zyada unevenness hone par self-leveling compound use karna sabse behtar hai, jo ek smooth aur level surface provide karta hai tiling ke liye.

questions.question: Demolition ke baad, walls par jo loose plaster ya paint ho, use kyun remove karna chahiye?

options.A: Naye paint ko kharab karne ke liye
options.B: Waterproofing aur tiling ke liye achhi adhesion provide karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Loose plaster ya paint ko remove karna zaroori hai, taaki waterproofing aur tile adhesive ko ek strong aur stable surface mil sake adhesion ke liye.

questions.question: Jab aap ek load-bearing wall ko demolish kar rahe hon, toh kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Engineer se consult karna aur temporary supports provide karna

questions.explanation: Load-bearing wall ko demolish karte waqt engineer se consult karna aur temporary supports provide karna bahut zaroori hai, taaki structure ko nuksaan na ho.

questions.question: Bathroom ki walls par moisture ya dampness ke signs dikhein, toh demolition ke baad kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Source of moisture ko identify aur theek karna, phir waterproofing karna

questions.explanation: Moisture source ko identify aur theek karna bahut zaroori hai, varna future mein waterproofing aur tiling fail ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Conduit pipe ki routing plan karte waqt kis baat ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Future maintenance aur accessibility ka dhyaan rakhna

questions.explanation: Conduit pipe ki routing plan karte waqt future maintenance aur accessibility ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye, taaki repairs easy hon.

questions.question: Purane drainage pipes ko nikalte waqt kya safety precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Proper ventilation aur hygiene maintain karna

questions.explanation: Purane drainage pipes mein sewage ya gandi cheezein ho sakti hain, isliye proper ventilation aur hygiene maintain karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar purane tiles ke neeche cement ki moti layer ho, toh usko remove karne ka sabse efficient tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Electric hammer drill ya breaker ka use karna

questions.explanation: Cement ki moti layer ko remove karne ke liye electric hammer drill ya breaker sabse efficient tool hai, jo time aur effort bachata hai.

questions.question: Site preparation ke dauran, floor aur wall junctions ko special attention kyun deni chahiye?

options.B: Ye areas waterproofing ke liye critical hote hain aur leakage ke chances zyada hote hain
options.C: Wahan par lights lagani hoti hain
options.D: Wahan par zyada dust hoti hai

questions.explanation: Floor aur wall junctions waterproofing ke liye critical hote hain kyuki yahan se leakage ke chances sabse zyada hote hain, isliye in areas ko properly seal karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Bathroom mein hot aur cold water supply ke liye commonly kaun se pipes use hote hain?

options.B: Copper ya CPVC pipes

questions.explanation: Hot aur cold water supply ke liye copper ya CPVC pipes commonly use hote hain kyuki ye high temperature aur pressure withstand kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Drainage pipes (wastewater) ke liye kaun sa material sabse zyada use hota hai?

options.B: PPR
options.C: PVC ya SWR (Soil, Waste, Rainwater) pipes

questions.explanation: Drainage pipes ke liye PVC ya SWR pipes sabse zyada use hote hain kyuki ye corrosion resistant aur cost-effective hote hain.

questions.question: Ek WC ke liye drain pipe ka minimum diameter kitna hona chahiye?

options.B: 2 inches

questions.explanation: WC ke liye proper flushing aur clog-free operation ke liye minimum 4 inches (100 mm) diameter ka drain pipe hona chahiye.

questions.question: P-trap ya S-trap ka bathroom plumbing mein kya role hai?

options.B: Sewage gases ko ghar mein aane se rokna

questions.explanation: P-trap ya S-trap mein paani jama rehta hai, jo ek seal banata hai aur sewage gases ko ghar mein aane se rokta hai.

questions.question: Water supply line mein leakage check karne ka sabse aasan tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Paani ko band karna aur meter reading check karna

questions.explanation: Sab fixtures band karne ke baad, agar water meter ki reading badhti hai, toh iska matlab hai ki kahin na kahin leakage hai.

questions.question: CPVC pipes ko join karne ke liye kis method ka use kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Threaded connections

questions.explanation: CPVC pipes ko solvent cement ka use karke join kiya jaata hai, jo ek strong aur leak-proof bond banata hai.

questions.question: Floor drain ki sahi placement kya honi chahiye?

options.B: Bathroom ke center mein
options.C: Shower area mein aur sabse neeche point par

questions.explanation: Floor drain shower area mein aur sabse neeche point par hona chahiye, taaki paani easily drain ho sake.

questions.question: Agar ek tap se paani tapak raha ho, toh kya possible reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Worn-out washer ya cartridge

questions.explanation: Tapakte hue tap ka sabse common reason worn-out washer ya cartridge hota hai, jise replace karne se problem theek ho jaati hai.

questions.question: Geyser installation ke liye, water supply connection mein kaun sa valve zaroori hai?

options.B: Gate valve

questions.explanation: Geyser installation mein Pressure Release Valve (PRV) bahut zaroori hai, jo high pressure build-up ko prevent karta hai aur safety ensure karta hai.

questions.question: Drainage pipes mein proper 'slope' (dhalan) maintain karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Wastewater ko gravity flow se theek se drain karne ke liye
options.C: Pipes ko support dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper slope wastewater ko gravity flow se theek se drain karne mein madad karta hai, aur clogging ko prevent karta hai.

questions.question: Bathroom mein exhaust fan install karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Moisture, smell aur humidity ko bahar nikalne ke liye

questions.explanation: Exhaust fan moisture, smell aur humidity ko bahar nikalta hai, jo mold aur mildew growth ko rokta hai aur air quality ko improve karta hai.

questions.question: Concealed plumbing (hidden pipes) install karte waqt kya precautions leni chahiye?

options.A: Pipes ko bas aise hi daal dena
options.B: Proper insulation, pressure testing aur easy access points plan karna

questions.explanation: Concealed plumbing mein proper insulation, pressure testing aur easy access points plan karna future maintenance aur leakage se bachne ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar naye WC flush mein paani kam aa raha ho, toh kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Water supply valve, flush tank mechanism ya fill valve

questions.explanation: Kam paani aane par water supply valve, flush tank mechanism aur fill valve ko check karna chahiye, jo common issues hote hain.

questions.question: PPR (Polypropylene Random Copolymer) pipes ko join karne ka standard method kya hai?

options.B: Threaded joints

questions.explanation: PPR pipes ko heat fusion welding se join kiya jaata hai, jo ek strong aur leak-proof joint banata hai.

questions.question: Water hammer (pipes mein thumping noise) ko kaise minimize kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Air chambers ya water hammer arrestors install karke

questions.explanation: Water hammer ko minimize karne ke liye air chambers ya water hammer arrestors install karna effective hota hai, jo pressure surges ko absorb karte hain.

questions.question: Bathroom drain mein gandi smell aane ka kya karan ho sakta hai?

options.B: Dry P-trap, blocked vent pipe ya leakage

questions.explanation: Dry P-trap (jahan paani ka seal toot gaya ho), blocked vent pipe ya kahin leakage se sewage gases ghar mein aa sakte hain, jisse gandi smell aati hai.

questions.question: Water heater ke liye separate electrical circuit kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: High power consumption ke karan overloading se bachne ke liye

questions.explanation: Water heater high power consume karta hai, isliye overloading aur fire hazards se bachne ke liye ek dedicated circuit zaroori hai.

questions.question: Bathroom mein waterproofing karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Walls aur floor ko paani ke nuksaan se bachane aur leakage rokne ke liye
options.C: Bathroom ko garam rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Waterproofing walls aur floor ko paani ke nuksaan se bachati hai, leakage rokti hai aur mold growth ko prevent karti hai.

questions.question: Waterproofing membrane kahan apply ki jaati hai?

options.B: Tiles lagane se pehle floor aur walls par

questions.explanation: Waterproofing membrane tiles lagane se pehle floor aur walls par apply ki jaati hai, taaki paani substrate mein na ja sake.

questions.question: Kon se area mein waterproofing sabse zyada critical hai?

options.B: Wash basin area
options.C: Shower area aur floor drain ke aas-paas

questions.explanation: Shower area aur floor drain ke aas-paas waterproofing sabse critical hai, kyuki yahan paani ka direct aur continuous contact hota hai.

questions.question: Tiling shuru karne se pehle, floor aur walls ko kis cheez se saaf karna chahiye?

options.B: Dust, grease aur loose particles

questions.explanation: Tiling se pehle surface ko dust, grease aur loose particles se saaf karna zaroori hai, taaki tile adhesive achhe se pakad sake.

questions.question: Tile adhesive ko apply karne ka kaun sa tool sabse common hai?

options.B: Notched trowel

questions.explanation: Notched trowel tile adhesive ko evenly spread karne ke liye use hota hai, jisse tiles ko achhi adhesion milti hai.

questions.question: Tile spacers ka kya use hai?

options.B: Tiles ke beech uniform grout lines maintain karne ke liye
options.D: Tiles ko saaf karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Tile spacers tiles ke beech uniform grout lines maintain karte hain, jisse finished look professional lagta hai.

questions.question: Grouting karne se pehle kya ensure karna chahiye?

options.B: Tile adhesive poori tarah se sookh gaya ho

questions.explanation: Grouting se pehle tile adhesive ka poori tarah se sookhna zaroori hai, varna grout mein cracks aa sakte hain.

questions.question: Kon se type ke tiles bathroom floor ke liye sabse suitable hain?

options.B: Matte finish, non-slip tiles

questions.explanation: Bathroom floor ke liye matte finish, non-slip tiles sabse suitable hain, kyuki ye wet conditions mein bhi slip-resistant hote hain.

questions.question: Tile cutter ka use kisliye kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Tiles ko polish karne ke liye
options.B: Tiles ko precise tareeke se kaatne ke liye

questions.explanation: Tile cutter tiles ko straight lines mein ya curves mein precise tareeke se kaatne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Epoxy grout ka kya fayda hai over cementitious grout?

options.B: Water-resistant, stain-resistant aur zyada durable hota hai

questions.explanation: Epoxy grout water-resistant, stain-resistant aur zyada durable hota hai, jo bathroom jaise wet areas ke liye ideal hai.

questions.question: Waterproofing ke baad 'flood test' (paani rok kar check karna) kyun kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Bathroom ko saaf karne ke liye
options.B: Waterproofing membrane ki effectiveness aur leakage ko check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Flood test waterproofing membrane ki effectiveness aur kisi bhi hidden leakage ko check karne ke liye kiya jaata hai, taaki future mein koi problem na ho.

questions.question: Tile adhesive ki 'open time' se kya matlab hai?

options.A: Kitni der mein adhesive sookhta hai
options.B: Adhesive lagane ke baad kitni der tak tiles lagaye ja sakte hain

questions.explanation: Open time woh time period hota hai jismein adhesive lagane ke baad bhi tiles ko adjust aur place kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Large format tiles lagate waqt kaun si technique use karni chahiye?

options.B: Back buttering (tile ke peeche bhi adhesive lagana)

questions.explanation: Large format tiles mein back buttering technique use karni chahiye, jisse tile aur substrate ke beech full coverage aur strong bond banta hai, voids se bacha jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar tiles lagane ke baad hollow sound aaye, toh iska kya matlab ho sakta hai?

options.A: Tiles bahut achhe se lage hain
options.B: Adhesive coverage theek nahi hai ya air void hai

questions.explanation: Hollow sound ka matlab hai ki tile ke neeche adhesive coverage theek nahi hai ya air void hai, jisse tile tootne ka risk badh jaata hai.

questions.question: Bathroom mein wall tiling kahan se shuru karni chahiye?

options.B: Bottom se (floor level se)

questions.explanation: Wall tiling bottom se shuru karni chahiye (floor level se), taaki neeche se ek level base mile aur upar ki tiles evenly lag sake.

questions.question: Tile grout ko saaf karne ke liye kaun sa tool use hota hai?

options.B: Rubber float

questions.explanation: Rubber float grout ko tiles ke joints mein press karne aur excess grout ko remove karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Waterproofing ke liye liquid membrane use karte waqt, minimum kitne coats apply karne chahiye?

options.B: Do ya teen coats, manufacturer ke instructions ke according

questions.explanation: Liquid waterproofing membrane ki effectiveness ke liye, manufacturer ke instructions ke according do ya teen coats apply karna zaroori hai, taaki achhi protection mile.

questions.question: Naya WC install karte waqt, floor drain ke saath connection ke liye kya use hota hai?

options.B: Wax ring ya rubber gasket

questions.explanation: WC ko floor drain se seal karne ke liye wax ring ya rubber gasket use kiya jaata hai, jo leak-proof connection ensure karta hai.

questions.question: Wash basin install karte waqt, wall par uski height kitni honi chahiye?

options.B: Ground se approximately 32-34 inches (81-86 cm)

questions.explanation: Standard height ground se approximately 32-34 inches (81-86 cm) hoti hai, jo comfortable use ke liye ideal hai.

questions.question: Shower mixer install karte waqt, hot aur cold water inlets ko kaise connect karna chahiye?

options.B: Hot water left side par aur cold water right side par
options.C: Hot water right side par aur cold water left side par

questions.explanation: Standard plumbing practice ke according, hot water connection left side par aur cold water connection right side par hota hai.

questions.question: Geyser install karte waqt, electrical connections kon karega?

options.B: Sirf certified electrician

questions.explanation: Geyser ke electrical connections sirf certified electrician ko karne chahiye, safety aur proper wiring ke liye.

questions.question: Bathroom accessories jaise towel rail ya soap dish install karte waqt, kis tool ka use karna chahiye?

options.B: Drill machine aur appropriate screws/anchors

questions.explanation: Drill machine aur appropriate screws/anchors ka use karke accessories ko securely wall par install kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar wash basin drain slow ho, toh kya possible reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Hair, soap scum ya debris se block ho gaya ho

questions.explanation: Slow drain ka sabse common reason hair, soap scum ya debris se blockage hota hai, jo P-trap mein jama ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Mirror install karte waqt, kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Wall type ke according sahi fasteners use karna aur level check karna
options.D: Usko bas aise hi rakh dena

questions.explanation: Mirror ko securely install karne ke liye wall type ke according sahi fasteners use karna aur level check karna zaroori hai, taaki woh gire nahi.

questions.question: Concealed cistern (hidden flush tank) install karte waqt, kis baat ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Usko jaldi se band kar dena
options.B: Proper access panel for future maintenance aur leakage check
options.C: Usko pura cement se bhar dena

questions.explanation: Concealed cistern mein future maintenance aur leakage check ke liye ek access panel provide karna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Faucets (taps) install karte waqt, threads par kya apply karna chahiye, taaki leakage na ho?

options.B: Teflon tape ya pipe sealant

questions.explanation: Teflon tape ya pipe sealant threads par apply karne se leak-proof seal banta hai.

questions.question: Rain shower head install karte waqt, uski height kitni honi chahiye?

options.B: Average person ki height se upar (approx 7-8 feet)

questions.explanation: Rain shower head ko itni height par install karna chahiye ki average person comfortable ho, usually 7-8 feet.

questions.question: Wall-mounted WC install karne ke liye, kis type ke frame ya support ki zaroorat hoti hai?

options.B: Steel frame ya concealed cistern frame

questions.explanation: Wall-mounted WC ko support karne ke liye ek robust steel frame ya concealed cistern frame ki zaroorat hoti hai, jo wall ke andar install hota hai.

questions.question: Automatic flush sensor system install karte waqt, kis baat ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Sensor ki placement aur uski calibration
options.D: Usko jaldi se band kar dena

questions.explanation: Sensor ki proper placement aur calibration zaroori hai, taaki woh theek se detect kare aur unnecessary flushing se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Bathroom cabinets install karte waqt, walls par kaun si cheez check karni chahiye?

options.B: Wall ki strength aur stud locations (agar wooden frame hai)

questions.explanation: Cabinets ko securely install karne ke liye wall ki strength aur stud locations check karna zaroori hai, taaki woh gir na jaayen.

questions.question: Shower enclosure ya glass partition install karte waqt, kis cheez ka use karna chahiye taaki paani bahar na nikle?

options.B: Silicone sealant ya waterproof gaskets

questions.explanation: Silicone sealant ya waterproof gaskets use karne se shower enclosure ke joints seal ho jaate hain aur paani bahar nahi nikalta.

questions.question: Agar naye tap se paani ka flow kam aa raha ho, toh kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Aerator blockage ya water pressure

questions.explanation: Kam flow ka reason aerator blockage ya low water pressure ho sakta hai, jise check aur theek karna chahiye.

questions.question: Bidet installation mein, water supply aur drainage connection kaise hone chahiye?

options.B: Separate hot aur cold water supply aur ek dedicated drain

questions.explanation: Bidet ke liye separate hot aur cold water supply aur ek dedicated drain connection zaroori hai, proper functionality ke liye.

questions.question: Renovation ke baad, bathroom ko final clean karte waqt kya use karna chahiye?

options.B: Mild cleaners aur soft cloths

questions.explanation: Mild cleaners aur soft cloths use karne se fixtures aur surfaces ko nuksaan nahi hota aur woh chamak jaate hain.

questions.question: Grout lines ko saaf aur maintain karne ke liye kya advice deni chahiye?

options.B: Regular cleaning aur agar zaroorat ho toh grout sealant apply karna

questions.explanation: Regular cleaning aur grout sealant apply karne se grout lines saaf rehti hain aur mold growth se bacha ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Customer ko renovation ke baad kya instructions deni chahiye?

options.B: Maintenance tips, warranty info aur emergency contact
options.D: Naye products ke bare mein bataana

questions.explanation: Customer ko maintenance tips, warranty info aur emergency contact provide karna achhi customer service ka hissa hai aur unhe future mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Agar renovation ke baad koi choti si imperfection (jaise chhota scratch) dikhe, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Usko theek karna ya repair karna

questions.explanation: Choti imperfections ko theek karna customer satisfaction ke liye zaroori hai aur professional approach dikhata hai.

questions.question: Final inspection ke dauran, light fittings ko kaise check karna chahiye?

options.B: Sabhi light fittings ko on/off karke aur unki functionality check karke

questions.explanation: Sabhi light fittings ki functionality check karna zaroori hai, taaki koi electrical issue na ho.

questions.question: Customer feedback lena kyun important hai?

options.B: Future projects ke liye improvement aur business growth ke liye
options.C: Customer ko pareshan karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Customer feedback se services ko improve kiya ja sakta hai aur positive reviews se business growth hoti hai.

questions.question: Bathroom mein exhaust fan ki proper working condition check karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Humidity control aur fresh air circulation ke liye

questions.explanation: Exhaust fan ki proper working humidity control aur fresh air circulation ke liye zaroori hai, jo mold growth ko rokti hai.

questions.question: Agar client naye fixtures ke maintenance ke bare mein poochhe, toh kya advise deni chahiye?

options.B: Manufacturer ki cleaning instructions aur recommended products use karna

questions.explanation: Manufacturer ki instructions follow karne se fixtures ki life badhti hai aur unhe nuksaan nahi hota.

questions.question: Renovation ke baad, bathroom floor par paani jama hone ka kya matlab ho sakta hai?

options.B: Improper floor slope ya blocked drain

questions.explanation: Paani jama hone ka matlab hai ki floor slope theek nahi hai ya drain block ho gaya hai, jise theek karna zaroori hai leakage se bachne ke liye.

questions.question: Final handover se pehle, sabhi taps aur shower head se paani ka flow aur pressure check karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Proper functionality aur potential blockages ko identify karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Flow aur pressure check karne se ensure hota hai ki sabhi fixtures theek se kaam kar rahe hain aur koi blockage nahi hai.

questions.question: Minor repairs jaise loose screw ya chhota paint touch-up, kya yeh customer service ka hissa hai?

options.B: Haan, yeh customer satisfaction aur good reputation ke liye zaroori hai

questions.explanation: Minor repairs ko address karna achhi customer service ka hissa hai aur client satisfaction ko badhata hai.

questions.question: Agar renovation ke baad bathroom mein gandi smell aaye, toh kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Dry P-trap, drainage issues ya hidden leakage

questions.explanation: Gandi smell dry P-trap, drainage issues ya hidden leakage ke karan ho sakti hai, jise identify aur theek karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Customer ko naye tiles ki long-term maintenance ke liye kya advise deni chahiye?

options.A: Har din acid se saaf karna
options.B: Regular soft cleaning, avoiding abrasive chemicals aur timely re-grouting

questions.explanation: Regular soft cleaning, avoiding abrasive chemicals aur timely re-grouting se tiles ki life badhti hai aur woh naye jaise dikhte hain.

questions.question: Renovation ke baad, bathroom mein ventilation check karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Moisture build-up aur mold growth ko rokne ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper ventilation moisture build-up aur mold growth ko rokti hai, jo bathroom ki cleanliness aur health ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Ek professional renovation worker ke liye 'after-sales service' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Project ke baad bhi customer ki queries ko address karna aur minor issues ko solve karna
options.C: Customer se dobara baat na karna

questions.explanation: After-sales service mein project ke baad bhi customer ki queries ko address karna aur minor issues ko solve karna shamil hai, jo trust aur long-term relationship banata hai.

questions.question: Final bill aur payment process ko customer ke saath kaise discuss karna chahiye?

options.B: Transparently, sabhi charges explain karke aur payment options discuss karke

questions.explanation: Final bill aur payment process ko transparently discuss karna customer trust ke liye zaroori hai.
